banners.name: Moksha · Liberation
banners.def: Freedom from karma and rebirth is the soul's eternal home.

banners.name: Ahimsa · Non-Violence
banners.def: Harmlessness toward all beings is the foundation of all virtues.

banners.name: Samata · Equanimity
banners.def: Equal-mindedness in pleasure and pain reveals the soul's true nature.

banners.name: Krodha · Anger
banners.def: Anger destroys equanimity and generates the most intense karma.

banners.name: Moksha · Liberation
banners.def: Freedom from karma and rebirth is the soul's eternal home.

banners.name: Avijja · Ignorance
banners.def: Lack of spiritual vision perpetuates the cycle of rebirth.

banners.name: Moksha · Liberation
banners.def: Freedom from karma and rebirth is the soul's eternal home.

banners.name: Moksha · Liberation
banners.def: Freedom from karma and rebirth is the soul's eternal home.

banners.name: Vairāgya · Detachment
banners.def: Release from desire is the gateway to spiritual awakening.

banners.name: Sanga · Attachment
banners.def: Emotional bonds to people and things perpetuate suffering.

banners.name: Sanga · Attachment
banners.def: Emotional bonds to people and things perpetuate suffering.

banners.name: Tapa · Austerity
banners.def: Deliberate practice that weakens karma and strengthens the soul.

banners.name: Lobha · Greed
banners.def: Craving for possessions generates binding karma without ceasing.

banners.def: Craving for possessions generates binding karma without ceasing.

banners.def: Emotional bonds to people and things perpetuate suffering.

banners.name: Tapa · Austerity
banners.def: Deliberate practice that weakens karma and strengthens the soul.

banners.name: Moksha · Liberation
banners.def: Freedom from karma and rebirth is the soul's eternal home.

banners.name: Avijja · Ignorance
banners.def: Lack of spiritual vision perpetuates the cycle of rebirth.

banners.name: Tyaga · Renunciation
banners.def: Voluntarily releasing worldly attachments leads to spiritual freedom.

banners.name: Impermanence and Death
banners.def: All worldly things are temporary—clinging to them brings suffering.

banners.name: Vairāgya · Non-Attachment
banners.def: Detachment from worldly desires allows the soul to perceive its true nature.

banners.name: Tapa · Austerity
banners.def: Deliberate practice that weakens karma and strengthens the soul.
